Our story

Raising the bar

We got sick of watching great events get stuck with mediocre bar service. Hosts scrambling to DIY their own bar. Guests settling for whatever's cold.

So we grabbed our kits and hit the road. Nomadic Alchemy started as a bet that people wanted better — a bar service that could actually show up anywhere and deliver. Turns out, they did.

Now we're out here turning parking lots, backyards, and rooftops into proper drinking establishments. We raise the bar and bring it to you.

What we offer

Our services

Full service mobile bartending and beyond

01

Mobile bar service

Weddings, corporate events, private parties — we bring the full bar setup to you. Professional bartenders, quality ingredients, seamless service from first pour to last call.

Weddings Corporate Private parties
02

Mixology workshops

Hands-on classes for enthusiasts and hospitality staff alike. Learn proper techniques, flavor balance, and recipes that work in the real world — whether you're leveling up your home bar or training your team to pour with confidence.

Enthusiasts Staff training Techniques
03

Cocktail menu consulting

Running a restaurant or hotel and need a cocktail menu that actually works? We design drink programs that fit your concept, your crowd, and your kitchen's reality — menus your staff can execute and your guests will order.

Restaurants Hotels Menu design
